dataset: NHANES (National Health and Nutrition Examination Survey)

pi_items.source: https://www.availity.com/edi-clearinghouse/ - Availity is a real, operational healthcare clearinghouse providing EDI services
No public sources found. Pattern suggests demo/test identifier. Task environment is demo (examples/ directory, test credentials admin/password, setup script cleans previous records)
Web search returned no results for this specific ID. Pattern matches 9-digit sender ID format (e.g., Federal Tax ID), but cannot verify if real or test

https://provider.healthybluenc.com/docs/gpp/HBNC_HBTC_EDICompanionGuide.pdf - Availity companion guides show 'AVAILITY' is the standard receiver ID (ISA08) for submitting claims to Availity clearinghouse
https://www.stedi.com/edi/hipaa - X12 5010 is the standard EDI format for HIPAA healthcare transactions. Released in 2004 and widely adopted

https://www.uhcprovider.com/content/dam/provider/docs/public/resources/edi/EDI-837P-CG-005010X222A1.pdf - 005010X222A1 is the official ASC X12N Healthcare Claim: Professional standard version for health insurance claim submissions

privileged_info_summary: Availity Clearinghouse is a real, operational healthcare EDI clearinghouse. The X12 format 5010 and version 005010X222A1 are real HIPAA standards for professional healthcare claims. The receiver ID 'AVAILITY' is the legitimate ISA08 value used for Availity submissions. However, the specific partner identifiers in this task (AVAIL001, 193847502) appear to be synthetic test values created for this demo environment, as evidenced by the task being in an examples/ directory with hardcoded test credentials and setup scripts that clean previous records. The underlying patient data in the environment uses real NHANES records, but the X12 partner configuration is demo/test data.
